name: Rune of Death
description: Discard after you draw an 'Ambush' card. Discard the 'Ambush' card without resolving it.

name: Rune of Insight
description: Discard at the end of your action phase to discard all search tokens in your space and all spaces adjacent to your space.

name: Stasis Rune
description: Discard at the end of your status phase to take an additional turn at the end of this turn.

name: Rune of Dragonfire
description: Discard when you are about to draw a dragon card. Return all of the dragon cards to the deck and shuffle it.

name: Life Drain Rune
description: Discard after defeating a monster in combat. Heal all of your wounds.

name: Rune of Transformation
description: Discard after you draw a dungeon chamber to draw a second dungeon chamber. Shuffle one chamber back into the stack and place the other on the board as normal.

name: Rune of Luck
description: Discard after you fail an attribute test. The test automatically succeeds instead. Then, discard all of your determination tokens.

name: Teleportation Rune
description: Discard at the end of your status phase to move to any adjacent space and resolve its effects. If you encounter a monster, you cannot escape.

name: Rune of Blinding
description: Discard after you draw a search, crypt, or corpse card. Suffer 1 wound and discard the card without resolving it.

name: Rune of Opening
description: Discard at the end of your status phase to ignore all doors and portcullises during that turn.

name: Rune of Healing
description: Discard at the end of your status phase to heal up to 6 wounds.

name: Rune of Vision
description: Discard at the end of your status phase to draw 4 search cards, arrange them in any order you like, and return them to the top of the search deck.
